title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at MedPlus South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at MedPlus South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, MedPlus South Asia Partners in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MedPlus South Asia Partners:
MedPlus South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus South Asia Partners!
